_meta.purpose: Opening sentences in Hinglish — the way Indian patients naturally start typing a review. Mix of Roman Hindi and English words. NO formal translation.
rules: Must feel like WhatsApp-style casual writing
Avoid over-mixing — real Hinglish has natural flow not forced mixing
Some sentences are mostly Hindi words in Roman script
Some are mostly English with Hindi words dropped in
Spelling can be phonetic — 'bahut' not 'bahoot', 'accha' not 'acha'

5star: Bahut accha experience raha yahan pe.
Sach mein bahut khush hoon is clinic se.
Pehle visit mein hi impression ban gaya.
Bohot dino se problem thi, yahan aake finally relief mili.
Is clinic ke baare mein sunke aaya tha, expectation se zyada nikla.
Honestly bolunga toh best decision tha yahan aana.
Itne sare doctors try karne ke baad finally yahan result mila.
Meri family ne recommend kiya tha, bilkul sahi kiya.
Pehli baar homeopathy try ki aur is jagah ne soch badal di.
Yaar seriously ek baar zaroor aao is clinic mein.
Bahut dino baad kisi doctor se itna satisfied feel kiya.
Doctors ke paas time hi nahi hota aajkal — yahan alag baat hai.
Ek friend ne bataya tha, ekdum sahi information di usne.
Pehle doubt tha homeopathy pe but ab nahi.
Result khud bol rahe hain, kuch kehne ki zaroorat nahi.
Itna dard tha ki soch liya tha operation karwa lena padega.
Kaafi doctors dikha chuka tha, koi fark nahi pad raha tha, tab ek dost ne Dr. Verma ka naam bataya.
Honestly bolun toh mujhe lagta nahi tha ki homeopathy itni jaldi kaam kar sakti hai.
Almost ek saal se problem thi, tab jaake Dr. Verma ke paas aaya aur finally kuch hua.
Sabne operation bolne ka pressure de rahe the, tabhi kisi ne Dr. Verma ke baare mein bataya.
Delhi, Mumbai — kaafi jagah gaya. Lucknow mein hi mila jo chahiye tha.
Pehli dawa ke din hi fark feel hua — yeh main jhooth nahi bol raha.
Mujhe homeopathy pe bilkul vishwas nahi tha. Ab hai. Dr. Verma ki wajah se.
Mahino se painkiller kha raha tha. Dr. Verma ne asli masla solve kar diya.
Yaqeen nahi hota abhi bhi ki bina operation ke stone nikal gaya.
4star: Ek friend ke kehne pe aaya tha, accha laga.
Overall positive raha mera experience yahan.
Clinic acha hai aur doctor bhi helpful hain.
Kaafi satisfied hoon treatment se abhi tak.
Visit achi rahi, doctor ne dhyan se suna.
Decent clinic hai, recommend kar sakta hoon.
Treatment chal raha hai aur results aa rahe hain.
3star: Yahan consultation ke liye aaya tha.
Ek baar aaya hoon abhi tak.
Dekhte hain aage kya hota hai.
